MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael A. King of Bradley Curley Asiano Barabee & Gale (464.8888 x246) for defendant and moving party
No other appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITIES WEST, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted, no opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issue, Evidence,L And Monetary Sanctions And To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITIES WEST,
L L C'S Motion For Issue, Evidence,L And Monetary Sanctions And To Compel Discovery Responses is denied as it seeks issue and evidentiary sanctions. The late compliance with the court's prior order was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $617.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Notice Of Motion 1) To Compel Responses To A) Request For Production Of Documents (Set One); B) Specially Pre Prepared Interrogatories (Set One); C) Form Interrogatories (Set One); 2) To Deem Admitted The Truth Of Matters In Request For Admissions; And 3) For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Lisa Feramisco, Esq., for defendant and moving party: PACIFIC EQUITIES WEST, LLC.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Jesse Hanley

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITIES WEST, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set One), Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set One), Form Interrogatories (Set One), And To Deem Admitted The Truth Of Matters In Request For Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
